title: trace.active_driver_chain.request

signal.description: Final leaf signal path. Aggregate, array, and struct roots are not expanded automatically.

time.description: Target sample time. Prefer a canonical string with a unit; a bare number is interpreted only with time_unit.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

limits.description: Resource limits for the recursive active trace

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth through pass-through assignments and aliases (default 8)

max_nodes.description: Maximum number of trace nodes before truncation (default 50)

max_alias_candidates.description: Maximum number of alias candidates to explore (default 8)

max_trace_signals.description: Maximum signal count for value lookup (default 64)

description: Trace an active-driver chain across multiple levels.
x-how_it_works: 从 signal/time 递归追溯 active driver；深度限制写 top-level limits.max_depth。遇到多个 active assignments 或多个 RHS sources 时在精确 active_time 返回前后值证据并停止。因 max_depth 停止时读取 data.depth_frontiers 与 suggested_next_actions，可从 frontier 续查或提高深度重跑。
x-when_to_use: 给出跨级根因链及 ambiguous RHS 现场。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: signal, time; do not use args.depth or args.clk_period

use_when: 需要从指定 signal/time 递归展开单条 active-driver chain。
do_not_use_when: 查询点是 X，且需要同时追踪多个 X RHS/control 分支。

alternatives.when: 需要按 X 可见性进行多分支追踪。

constraints: required: signal, time; do not use args.depth or args.clk_period
